      - paragraph: Tools and trends evolve, but collaboration endures. With GitHub, developers, agents, and code come together on one platform.

    - heading "Accelerate your entire workflow" [level=2]
    - paragraph: From your first line of code to final deployment, GitHub provides AI and automation tools to help you build and ship better software faster.
    - button "Pause video" [ref=e34]
    - text: A Copilot chat window with the 'Ask' mode enabled. The user switches from 'Ask' mode to 'Agent' mode from a dropdown menu, then sends the prompt 'Update the website to allow searching for running races by name.' Copilot analyzes the codebase, then explains the required edits for three files before generating them. Copilot then confirms completion and summarizes the implemented changes for the new functionality allowing users to search races by name and view paginated, filtered results.
    - heading "Your AI partner everywhere. Copilot is ready to work with you at each step of the software development lifecycle." [level=3]
    - link "Explore GitHub Copilot" [ref=e35]:
      - /url: /features/copilot
    - paragraph: Duolingo boosts developer speed by 25% with GitHub Copilot

    - heading "Built-in application security where found means fixed" [level=2]
    - paragraph: Use AI to find and fix vulnerabilities so your team can ship more secure software faster.
    - heading "Apply fixes in seconds. Spend less time debugging and more time building features with Copilot Autofix." [level=3]
    - link "Explore GitHub Advanced Security" [ref=e43]:
      - /url: /security/advanced-security
    - img "Copilot Autofix identifies vulnerable code and provides an explanation, together with a secure code suggestion to remediate the vulnerability." [ref=e44]
    - paragraph: Security debt, solved. Leverage security campaigns and Copilot Autofix to reduce application vulnerabilities.
    - link "Learn about GitHub Code Security" [ref=e45]:
      - /url: /security/advanced-security/code-security
    - img "A security campaign screen displays the campaign’s progress bar with 97% completed of 701 alerts. A total of 23 alerts are left with 13 in progress, and the campaign started 20 days ago. The status below shows that there are 7 days left in the campaign with a due date of November 15, 2024." [ref=e46]
    - paragraph: Dependencies you can depend on. Update vulnerable dependencies with supported fixes for breaking changes.
    - link "Learn about Dependabot" [ref=e47]:
      - /url: /security/advanced-security/software-supply-chain
    - img "List of dependencies defined in a requirements .txt file." [ref=e48]
    - paragraph: Your secrets, your business. Detect, prevent, and remediate leaked secrets across your organization.
    - link "Learn about GitHub Secret Protection" [ref=e49]:
      - /url: /security/advanced-security/secret-protection
    - img "GitHub push protection confirms and displays an active secret, and blocks the push." [ref=e50]
    - paragraph:
      - text: 70% MTTR reduction with Copilot Autofix
      - superscript:
        - link "Footnote 1" [ref=e51]:
          - /url: "#footnote-1"
          - text: "1"
    - paragraph:
      - text: 8.3M secret leaks stopped in the past 12 months with push protection
      - superscript:
        - link "Footnote 1" [ref=e52]:
          - /url: "#footnote-1"
          - text: "1"
    - heading "Work together, achieve more" [level=2]
    - paragraph: From planning and discussion to code review, GitHub keeps your team’s conversation and context next to your code.
